title: gonocarpus effusus
intro: Gonocarpus effusus, also known as the marsh tea tree or Australian pepper plant, is a native Australian plant that belongs to the family Haloragaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antifungal properties. Gonocarpus effusus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
